name: LocalScholar
shortDescription: Privacy-First AI Assistant Chrome Extension
description: Integrated 5 Chrome Built-in AI APIs for local-only summarization, flashcard generation, and report synthesis with zero data transmission. Architected Manifest V3 extension with 4,700+ lines vanilla JavaScript featuring multi-chunk processing, intelligent caching, and concurrent task management. Delivered study workflows generating adaptive flashcards, multi-source reports with citations, and 10+ language support powered by offline Gemini Nano. Achieved WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility compliance and CSP-compliant security architecture.

name: VisionForge
shortDescription: Full-Stack Deep Learning IDE with Drag-and-Drop Neural Network Design
description: Achieved 1st place in Claude Developer Tools track at HackASU 2025. Engineered full-stack deep learning IDE enabling drag-and-drop neural network design with automatic shape inference and real-time validation for rapid prototyping. Built production code generator supporting PyTorch and TensorFlow frameworks, transforming visual architectures into deployable models with single-click export functionality. Integrated AI assistant using Google Gemini API for natural language model modifications. Developed comprehensive layer library (CNNs, LSTMs, ResNets) with React 19 frontend and Django backend.

name: NMTSA - Education LMS
shortDescription: Accessibility-First LMS for Autism-Friendly Learning
description: Achieved 2nd place and Best Polish Product award at Opportunity Hack 2025, ASU Fall Hackathon 2025. Built an accessibility-first LMS enabling structured, autism-friendly learning with seamless course enrollment, CE certificates, and community features. Engineered dual-authentication and robust RBAC workflows for teacher verification, admin review, and high course quality. Integrated AI-powered semantic search, multilingual support (EN/ES), and PayPal payments to expand impact for families and clinicians.

name: AIM - Academic Integrity Mentor
shortDescription: Browser Extension for Academic Integrity Education
description: A browser extension that educates and keeps you informed about academic policies to avoid unintentional mistakes. Features include learning modules, quizzes, and crash courses on academic integrity, pre-submission checklists and reflection journals, user journey monitoring, one-stop access to all policies and resources, AI-powered chatbot with RAG-enabled knowledge base, helpful tools including planner and feedback provider, CANVAS API integration and direct webpage scraping, WebLLM and Gemini support, with all data stored locally and securely.

name: ResumeBotX
shortDescription: AI-Powered Resume Assistant
description: Agentic AI-powered resume building, job tracking, and smart career planning. Scrape jobs, identify skill gaps, enrich resumes, and get personalized learning plansâ€”all seamlessly integrated for success.

name: Archyx AI
shortDescription: Chat Interface for Summarizing and Managing Google Drive Files
description: A web application that utilizes the Gemini API, Vector embeddings, Langchain to summarize and manage Google Drive files efficiently using an agentic AI approach.

name: Local Image Finder (LIF)
shortDescription: Cross-Platform Desktop Image Search Application
description: A privacy-first, cross-platform desktop image search application that performs on-device semantic search using natural language or image queries to organize and retrieve local images efficiently.

name: ResumeClarity
shortDescription: Chrome Extension for Improving Resume ATS Scores
description: Developed a Chrome extension with Courtney Ngai to help students optimize resumes for ATS systems. The extension automatically analyzes the job content and provides suggestions for improvement.

name: BookTrack
shortDescription: AI-Powered Book Recommendation Web App
description: An AI-powered book recommendation web app that personalizes suggestions based on user-defined prompts. The app delivers a rich discovery experience with enhanced metadata and visual presentation.

name: dAIgrammatic
shortDescription: Agentic AI Application for Creating Diagrams
description: Developed an agentic AI application that allows users to create diagrams by simply describing them in natural language. The app uses advanced natural language processing to interpret user input and generate corresponding visual diagrams.

name: Note summarizer
shortDescription: Web Application for Summarizing Notes Using AI
description: Created a web application that leverages AI to summarize lengthy notes into concise, easy-to-read formats. The app supports multiple languages and includes features for saving, sharing, and exporting summaries.

name: CT Scanner 3D Reconstruction
shortDescription: 3D Reconstruction Program Using CT Scanner Data
description: Developed a program to reconstruct 3D objects from CT Scanner readings leveraging the MART (Multiplicative Algebraic Reconstruction Technique) algorithm. The software processes multiple 2D scans to create accurate 3D models of small objects.

name: Handwritten Character Recognition
shortDescription: Real-Time Devanagari Character Recognition System
description: Built and trained a 98% accurate Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model to recognize Devanagari characters drawn in front of a webcam in real-time. The system processes video input, extracts the drawn characters, and classifies them with high accuracy.

name: Context Monitor
shortDescription: Heartbeat and Respiration Rate Monitoring Android App
description: Created an Android app that monitors and displays the user's heartbeat and respiration rate in real-time. The app uses the device's camera and sensors to provide accurate readings and includes features for tracking health metrics over time.

name: Cards Of Conscience
shortDescription: Flutter AI-Powered Game for Teaching Refugee Policy
description: Developed a Flutter simulation card game for policymaking, where players select policy options across different domains while managing budget constraints. The game includes AI agents that participate in the decision-making process.

name: Cryptogak
shortDescription: Cross-platform command-line utility for string encryption
description: Cryptogak is a lightweight and efficient cross-platform command-line utility for encrypting and decrypting strings using common hash algorithms. It works on Linux and Windows.

name: Web development course
shortDescription: Created a web development course for beginners using Github actions
description: Developed a comprehensive web development course for beginners, focusing on key concepts and practical skills using GitHub actions.

name: Gesture Controlled Hologram Pong
shortDescription: Pong Game with 3D Hologram Display and Gesture Controls
description: Created an innovative pong game using Unity, with OpenCV Python code to detect player hand gestures for control. Formed a 3D hologram display using an upside-down truncated acrylic square prism placed on an LED screen, creating an immersive gaming experience.

name: Flutter games
shortDescription: Collection of games built with Flutter
description: Developed a collection of games using the Flutter framework, showcasing its capabilities for building interactive and visually appealing applications.

name: Multiplayer Bluetooth Tic-Tac-Toe game
shortDescription: Multiplayer Tic-Tac-Toe game over Bluetooth
description: Led a team to create a Bluetooth-enabled Tic Tac Toe application using Android Jetpack Compose, exceeding requirements and achieving an exceptional score of 125/120. The app features a simple and intuitive UI, score tracking, and the ability to play multiple rounds.

name: Docuer
shortDescription: InShorts-Style Adaptive Learning from Documentation
description: Transforms documentation websites into bite-sized, personalized learning paths. Docuer generates 160-word adaptive articles, auto-created quizzes, interactive knowledge graphs, and an AI chat assistant. It imports docs (including Google Drive), adapts paths to learner profiles, and offers a TikTok-style mobile interface with progress tracking and intelligent caching.

name: ProjectStory
shortDescription: Multi-Agent AI Document-to-Story Generator
description: Single-page React + TypeScript app that converts uploaded documents into multi-stage, industry-specific narratives using a 3-agent pipeline with Google Gemini and embeddings. Features a water-glass bubble UI, sequential agent pipeline, and client-side vector embeddings for context-aware content generation.

name: ProjectIAM
shortDescription: Decentralized Identity and Credentials Verification
description: Unicredify is a privacy-first decentralized Identity and Access Management system for university credential issuance and verification. It uses Privado ID wallets, zero-knowledge proofs for selective disclosure, on-chain anchoring on Polygon, a Supabase backend, and smart contracts for credential issuance and revocation.

name: Elektraz
shortDescription: Arizona Solar EV Charging Station Optimization Toolkit
description: Comprehensive toolkit for optimizing placement and sizing of solar-powered DC fast charging stations across Arizona. Includes data ingestion from public APIs, ML demand prediction, PV sizing using NREL APIs, economic modeling, and MILP optimization with a Streamlit dashboard and SHAP explainability.

name: CareCallerAI
shortDescription: Multilingual Real-Time AI Phone Triage Platform
description: Multilingual AI phone caller with Modal, Groq, ElevenLabs, and fine-tuned Whisper for STT evaluated on WER, CER, and medical recall. Engineered triage workflows, 5ms lexicon checks, 30ms memory-loaded prompts, LLM fallback rules, and Supabase cron monitoring. Loaded call context in ~30ms, triggered LLM fallback on entity confidence < 0.85, and supported AssemblyAI realtime with medical vocabulary boost for telephony-grade clinical transcription.

name: MoneyNest
shortDescription: Personalized GenUI Financial Wellness Platform
description: Led a team of 4 to build a multi-model multimodal LangGraph coaching app with smart routing, reducing AI latency by 45%. Routed Claude Sonnet to chat and document extraction, Gemini 2.5 Flash to image generation. Delivered profile-aware generative UI streaming via SSE, 20%+ spend-spike insights, ElevenLabs multilingual agents, and 6 interactive financial mini-games including Credit Quest, Insurance Card Game, and Wealth Farm.

name: CloudForge
shortDescription: 5-Agent LangGraph AWS Infrastructure Builder
description: 5-agent LangGraph pipeline generating Terraform HCL with TFLint and Checkov CIS validation, provisioning live AWS CloudFormation stacks via IAM STS with zero persistent credentials. Features FastAPI SSE across stages, Fernet-encrypted credentials, GitHub OAuth commits, Kuzu graph traversal for reusable cloud patterns, and LangGraph interrupt API for human-in-the-loop architecture review before code generation.

name: Geeky
shortDescription: Offline-First Adaptive Micro-Learning Flutter App
description: Flutter app with on-device SQLite, ObjectBox 768-dim vector store on Gemini embeddings, and RevenueCat IAP for 10+ users. Applied 9-signal adaptive path sequencing with ZPD fit, BKT Bayesian updates, and FSRS spaced repetition targeting 90% retention. Features ANN hybrid RAG with CrossEncoder reranking and MMR pruning, on-device knowledge graph computation in Dart, and docling-based content ingestion from multiple formats.

name: GameGenAI
shortDescription: Natural Language to Playable 2D Browser Game Generator
description: Full-stack platform converting natural language descriptions into playable HTML5/Canvas/JavaScript games via a 5-agent AWS Bedrock pipeline: Prompt Parser, Game Designer, Code Generator, Test/Debug Agent, and Runtime Monitor. Features up to 5 iterative self-correction test-analyze-patch cycles, hot-patching without full reloads, and a ReasoningTransparency panel exposing agent reasoning chains to users.

name: ShadowPath
shortDescription: Thermal-Comfort Shade-Aware Campus Routing App
description: Thermal-comfort-aware campus routing for ASU Tempe optimizing pedestrian routes for shade exposure and heat safety. Implements 4 parallel Dijkstra strategies (shortest, shade-maximizing, cooling-stop, UTCI-weighted) on one graph. Features time-travel shade geometry using real building footprints, cloud-aware diffusion from NWS forecast text parsing, and a HeatShield Day Planner with per-leg heat budgets and WHO-endorsed UTCI safety labels.

name: Shadow Committee
shortDescription: Adversarial AI Boardroom Simulation for Pitch Stress-Testing
description: Adversarial AI platform generating 3 domain-specific antagonist personas from uploaded materials to stress-test business pitches. Features adversarial document ingestion that constructs attack vectors specific to the user's domain (e.g. a FinTech pitch generates Compliance Officer, High-Frequency Trader, and Consumer Advocate personas). Includes real-time confidence scoring, limbic stress simulation via expression shifts, and PDF dossier generation.

name: COLLIDE
shortDescription: Energy Data Collision Simulator for Policy Planning
description: EnergyHackathon project using LangGraph, Claude, FastAPI, React, DuckDB, Parquet, and Recharts to simulate energy-data collision scenarios for planning and decision support. Built a policy-facing analytics workflow that turns heterogeneous datasets into explainable scenario comparisons and interactive visualizations.

name: Zeneuro
shortDescription: AI-Powered Neurodiversity Support Companion
description: Cross-platform companion app combining React, TypeScript, Express, GPT-4o, Capacitor, SQLite, and Drizzle ORM for personalized neurodiversity support workflows. Features local-first state, mobile packaging, conversational coaching, and structured reflection loops.

name: VisionVault
shortDescription: Computer Vision Face Archive and Search Toolkit
description: Python computer-vision toolkit using OpenCV, RetinaFace, PyTorch, and NumPy for face detection, embedding extraction, and searchable visual archives. Designed for local image processing workflows with reproducible pipelines and privacy-preserving storage.

name: CampusGPT
shortDescription: Campus Knowledge Assistant on Vertex AI and Cloud Run
description: Python and Streamlit campus assistant deployed with Vertex AI, Docker, Cloud Run, and GCP. Built retrieval and generation workflows for university information access with a lightweight interface suitable for fast iteration and demonstration.
